phrases.text_local: Onde posso guardar os casacos à entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee PO-soo gwar-DAR oos ka-SAH-kooz-ah en-TRAH-dah? (link 'z' sound)
phrases.cultural_note: Coat check services are complimentary and located for visitor convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no hall de entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, in the entrance hall.

responses.english: Good day, in the entrance hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no hall de entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cloister garden is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o jardim do claustro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO KLOWSHT-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The cloister garden is a central open area within the museum complex.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cloister garden entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada para o jardim do claustro?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-djee FEE-kah-ah en-TRA-dah-PAH-rah oo-zhar-DEEN zhar-DEEN-doo doo-KLAWS-troo
phrases.cultural_note: Cloister gardens offer a quiet historical retreat typical of Portuguese convents.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao Pátio do Convento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW PAHT-yoo DOO koong-VAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, next to the Cloister Courtyard.

responses.english: Good day, next to the Cloister Courtyard.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW PAHT-yoo DOO koong-VAYNG-too.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao Pátio do Convento.

phrases.text_local: onde posso levantar o áudio guia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW OW-deeoo GEEUH?

likely_response.local: Pode levantar o áudio guia na receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW OW-deeoo GEEUH NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pick up the audio guide at the front desk.

responses.english: You can pick up the audio guide at the front desk.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW OW-deeoo GEEUH NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.french: Pode levantar o áudio guia na receção.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy combined ticket
phrases.text_local: Onde compro o bilhete combinado para a igreja e museu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee KOM-proo-oo (blends) bi-YEE-chee kom-bee-NA-doo PA-ra-a (blends) ee-GREY-zhah-ee (blends) moo-ZEH-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets are standard for integrated heritage sites in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão da entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the main entrance counter.

responses.english: Good day, at the main entrance counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão da entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy combined tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde se adquirem os ingressos conjuntos da igreja e museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH uhd-KEE-rayng OOSH eeng-RIH-soosh koong-ZHOONNG-toosh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh EH moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors often bundle access to adjacent historical buildings for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the entrance ticket office.

responses.english: Good day, at the entrance ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.

phrases.text_local: Pode recomendar um restaurante bom perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih BOHNG PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou ao guarda do museu; eles conhecem bem a zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception or the museum guard; they know the area well.

responses.english: Ask at the reception or the museum guard; they know the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção ou ao guarda do museu; eles conhecem bem a zona.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar o casaco na entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo day-SHAHR AW kuh-ZAH-koo NUH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums typically offer complimentary coat check services near the main entrance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no átrio de entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHTR-yoo DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, in the entrance hall.

responses.english: Good day, in the entrance hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO AHTR-yoo DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no átrio de entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cloister garden entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a entrada para o Pátio do Convento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo DOO koong-VAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The cloister garden is accessed from within the museum's interior spaces.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the front desk or ticket counter.

responses.english: Ask at the front desk or ticket counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy combined tickets
phrases.cultural_note: The combined ticket covers both the museum and Igreja de Santo António.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main ticket counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main ticket counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Phoenician amphoras are
phrases.text_local: Onde está exposta a coleção de ânforas fenícias?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH ehsh-PAWSH-tuh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AHNNG-foo-ruhsh feh-NEE-seeuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The archaeology hall houses significant regional Roman and Phoenician artifacts.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na sala de arqueologia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, in the archaeology room.

responses.english: Good day, in the archaeology room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, na sala de arqueologia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy combined ticket
phrases.cultural_note: The combined ticket includes entry to both the museum and the church.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the ticket counter at the main gate.

responses.english: Good morning, at the ticket counter at the main gate.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na bilheteira da entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audio guides
phrases.text_local: Onde levanto os equipamentos de áudio guia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih leh-VAHNNG-too OOSH eh-kee-puh-MAYNG-toosh DIH OW-deeoo GEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically self-service or staffed near the main circulation area.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na mesa de áudio guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH MEH-zuh DIH OW-deeoo GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the audio guide desk.

responses.english: Good day, at the audio guide desk.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH MEH-zuh DIH OW-deeoo GEEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, na mesa de áudio guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman mosaics are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver os mosaicos romanos em exposição?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh AYNG ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Roman mosaics are a highlighted feature in the dedicated archaeology wing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Sala de Arqueologia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, in the Archaeology Room.

responses.english: Good day, in the Archaeology Room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Sala de Arqueologia.

phrases.cultural_note: Coat check is available at the entrance hall for visitor convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no guarda-volumes da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO GWAH-ruh-duh-voo-LOO-mihsh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the coat check in the entrance hall.

responses.english: Good morning, at the coat check in the entrance hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO GWAH-ruh-duh-voo-LOO-mihsh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
